title: selaginella parkeri var. vanheurckiana
intro: Selaginella parkeri var. vanheurckiana is a variety of the Selaginella plant, commonly known as spikemoss or resurrection plant, belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella parkeri var. vanheurckiana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and prevent the growth of certain bacteria. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying or steaming the leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
